# Project Instructions

Follow the rules defined in `AGENTS.md` at the repository root. That file is the
single source of truth for all coding standards, architecture decisions, and
workflow conventions.

Before starting any task, read `.context/index.md` and load files matching the
current task's domain. Standards, playbooks, and conventions are available on demand.

## Skills (GitHub Copilot)

Assessment, review, planning, and refactoring playbooks are available as GitHub Copilot skills. Type `/` to see all available commands, or describe your task and the relevant skill will be suggested.
